message:
test(channel): Expand broadcast + mpsc coverage (bd-139b)

Broadcast (112 lines added):
- broadcast_cloned_sender_both_deliver: messages from cloned senders
  are received in order
- broadcast_heavy_lag_overwrite: capacity-4 buffer with 10 sends
  correctly reports Lagged(6) and delivers remaining 4 messages
- broadcast_clone_receiver_shares_position: cloned receiver starts at
  same cursor position as original
- broadcast_reserve_then_send: reserve + send via permit delivers
- broadcast_drop_all_senders_closes: first sender drop keeps channel
  open, last sender drop produces Err(Closed)

MPSC (17 lines added):
- recv_cancelled_does_not_consume_message: cancellation during recv
  does not dequeue the message — subsequent non-cancelled recv
  retrieves it intact

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
